name: bespunky-design-system
description: BeSpunky design-system skills — styling as a SYSTEM, not a per-component afterthought. `design-system-first` (the DISCIPLINE, paired with an always-on directive the scaffolder bakes into every project): before you build any feature UI you go to the design system, and every visual value in the codebase comes from it. Never hardcode a style value — no raw hex/rgb/hsl, no magic px/rem, no ad-hoc font stack, shadow, radius, duration or easing: every colour, space, radius, type step, elevation, border, duration and easing is a TOKEN (a CSS custom property, consumed through the DS's SASS API), and a component reads SEMANTIC tokens only, never a raw primitive. A feature component is a COMPOSITION of DS components and tokens, never a place where new visual values are invented. The SECOND occurrence of a UI pattern is a PROMOTION, not a copy-paste — the moment a card, button, panel, field or layout shape appears twice it is lifted into the DS as a reusable component (one secondary entry point each, `nx g @bespunky/nx-tools:ds-component <name>`), BOTH sites are migrated onto it, and the copies are deleted. When the DS lacks the concept you need, MODEL it (add the token, add the semantic alias, extend the scale, add the component) — never work around the gap with a local override, an !important, a ::ng-deep reach-in, a duplicated token, or a one-off variant boolean; a gap in the DS is a design gap, and patching it locally is the styling flavour of the patch architecture-first forbids, made worse by CSS having no compiler to catch the drift. The payoff: a re-theme or a rebrand is a change to TOKENS, not to a thousand component files. `design-tokens-and-theming` (the TECHNIQUES, a router over reference clusters): TWO LAYERS, ONE TRUTH — CSS custom properties are the RUNTIME layer (cascading, themeable: a mode is a re-binding of tokens, never a swapped stylesheet and never a rebuild) and the SASS API is the AUTHOR-TIME layer (zero-output functions/mixins/placeholders, summoned per-file with @use, never a global side-effect). Clusters: token taxonomy & naming (primitive → semantic → component tiers, the scales, the naming grammar); CSS custom properties as the runtime layer (where :root is emitted, the cascade, fallbacks, @property, when a SASS variable is still correct); the SASS API layer and how it is summoned; theming & modes (light/dark/brand, where a mode LIVES and how it persists without a flash, contrast that holds in EVERY mode); component styling & encapsulation (:host, :host-context, ::part, ViewEncapsulation, why ::ng-deep is banned, variants as data not booleans); the DS library's structure & entry points (public vs internal surfaces, one component = one secondary entry point, generator-first). Encodes the visual system bespunky-product-ux:stage-the-vision produces — this plugin does not invent the look, it makes the look live in ONE place.
